    Struct JsonContent

    Represents an immutable json object stored in memory.

    Implements
    ICloneable
    IEquatable<JsonContent>
    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.IO
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public readonly struct JsonContent : ICloneable, IEquatable<JsonContent>
    Remarks

    The data structure is stored in memory as a DOM, using standard objects and collections.
    Use Serialize(object, JsonSerializerOptions) and Deserialize<T>(JsonSerializerOptions) to convert to your types.
    Use Parse(JsonDocument) and ToJson(JsonSerializerOptions) to convert from/to raw json text.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Content

    Gets the dynamic json structure.

    Name Description

    GetValue<T>(params IConvertible[])

    Parse(string, JsonDocumentOptions)

    Parses a json text an converts it to a JsonContent
    Parse(JsonDocument)
    Serialize(object, JsonSerializerOptions)

    Converts the value of a specified type into a JsonContent using System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.
